metadata.description: A curated collection of specialized AI prompts, designed to enhance productivity and automate common tasks through intelligent conversation interfaces.

plugins.name: analyst
plugins.description: Analysts are a collection of agents that help you write requirements specifications and generate solution designs.

plugins.name: developer
plugins.description: Developers are a collection of skills that help you maintain and improve code quality.

plugins.name: dotnet-developer
plugins.description: DotNet Developers are a collection of agents that help you generate and maintain unit tests for .NET applications.

plugins.name: git-manager
plugins.description: Git Managers are a collection of skills that help you manage Git repositories.

plugins.name: leader
plugins.description: Leaders are a collection of agents that help you create compelling presentations and communicate ideas effectively.

plugins.name: ai-engineer
plugins.description: AI Engineer is a collection of skills that help you create and optimize VS Code agents and skills.

plugins.name: php-developer
plugins.description: PHP Developers are a collection of agents that help you generate and maintain unit tests for PHP applications.

plugins.name: software-evaluator
plugins.description: Software Evaluators are a collection of agents that help you evaluate cloud-native applications and software procurement decisions.

plugins.name: technical-writer
plugins.description: Technical Writers are a collection of agents that help you create how-to documents, quick reference guides, and user guides.

plugins.name: tester
plugins.description: Testers are a collection of agents that help you generate comprehensive test cases for your applications.
